estimated_cost_impact_reasoning: 55% consolidated Section 301 tariff on SM-A, HATU, DCM, DMF, 2-Fluorotoluene. Source: MRP tariff_sweep at 55%. Adjusted cost $6,634/kg vs baseline $5,208/kg.
estimated_timeline_reasoning: Tariff escalation does not directly affect lead times; however, spot allocation constraints on HATU may extend lead time by 3–5 weeks.
caveats: Assumes full consolidated rate applies to all CN-origin materials.
Indirect China exposure (DIPEA via India) excluded — adds ~$21/kg if captured.
